'''nalovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headfuckery|headfuckery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headfuckery|headfuckery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nalovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næleveth|næleveth]] || [[word:nælevej|nælevej]] || [[word:nælevesh|nælevesh]] || [[word:næleve|næleve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalolovoth|nalolovoth]] || [[word:nalolovoj|nalolovoj]] || [[word:nalolovosh|nalolovosh]] || [[word:nalolovo|nalolovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalovoth|nalovoth]] || [[word:nalovoj|nalovoj]] || [[word:nalovosh|nalovosh]] || [[word:nalovo|nalovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalofvofth|nalofvofth]] || [[word:nalofvofj|nalofvofj]] || [[word:nalofvofsh|nalofvofsh]] || [[word:nalofvof|nalofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalovotho|nalovotho]] || [[word:nalovojo|nalovojo]] || [[word:nalovosho|nalovosho]] || [[word:nalovoko|nalovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalovoth|nalovoth]] || [[word:nalovoj|nalovoj]] || [[word:nalovosh|nalovosh]] || [[word:nalovo|nalovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalovothol|nalovothol]] || [[word:nalovojol|nalovojol]] || [[word:nalovoshol|nalovoshol]] || [[word:nalovokol|nalovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalovoothotho|nalovoothotho]] || [[word:nalovoojojo|nalovoojojo]] || [[word:nalovooshosho|nalovooshosho]] || [[word:nalovooko|nalovooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalovothon|nalovothon]] || [[word:nalovojon|nalovojon]] || [[word:nalovoshon|nalovoshon]] || [[word:nalovokon|nalovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalovothooro|nalovothooro]] || [[word:nalovojooro|nalovojooro]] || [[word:nalovoshooro|nalovoshooro]] || [[word:nalovokooro|nalovokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
